title: Altered cortical thickness following prenatal sodium valproate exposure.
ehr_evidence: No mention of EHR or linked health data; participants were recruited via hospital and community advertisements for a prospective study.
summary: A study investigating the effects of prenatal sodium valproate (VPA) exposure on cortical thickness in children using MRI and neuropsychological assessments.
key_findings: Increased left inferior frontal gyrus (IFG) and left pericalcarine sulcus thickness in VPA-exposed children.
Association between VPA dose and right IFG thickness.
Absence of normal asymmetry in the IFG region of VPA-exposed children.
Relationship between verbal skills and left IFG thickness.
